title: Rise Baking snaps up wholesale manufacturer Jimmy’s Gourmet Bakery
summary:
Rise Baking Company is set to buy Jimmy’s Gourmet Bakery, a New Jersey-based maker of cookies and other baked goods.

title: Fresh Servant plucks Bama Fresh Cuts in foodservice push
summary:
